source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Refined English product UI with luxury editorial display guidance and Japanese typography guidance for Noto Sans JP or Yu Gothic interface text, Mincho-style display headings, compact data labels, and readable table rows.
layout: Polished product dashboards, 8px radii, ivory petal surfaces, glossy leaf navigation, soft champagne focus rings, restrained shadows, precise spacing, and quiet data-dense luxury workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent gardenia bloom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Gardenia transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a complete gardenia bloom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A southern garden gardenia bloom with layered ivory-white waxy petals, subtle cream petal shadows, a few glossy deep green leaves, crisp botanical detail, polished luxurious natural texture, and clean studio lighting. The bloom should be recognizable as gardenia, not rose or magnolia.
Composition/framing: centered complete bloom cutout with leaves visible, generous padding on every side, no cropping.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape, no second flower, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Gardenia light-mode design-system board, regenerated for larger source resolution
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board named "Morphous Gardenia", clearly derived from the provided gardenia bloom motif cutout.
Reference use: Use the visible gardenia bloom as the source of truth. Extract ivory waxy petal surfaces, cream petal shadows, glossy deep green leaves, soft southern garden shadow, and polished luxury-product UI rhythm. The board must visibly respect these colors and materials.
Canvas: strict 16:9 landscape design board, target 3840x2160, wide 4K-class source asset. Do not create a square or portrait image.
Resolution and legibility: large readable section labels, a precise editorial grid, generous section spacing, fewer larger token rows, no dense tiny tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Gardenia, Gardenia Bloom, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, modal, popover, command palette/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, metrics, charts, data table, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius guidance, border tokens, soft shadow tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: refined English product UI with luxury editorial display guidance; Japanese typography guidance using Noto Sans JP or Yu Gothic for interface text and a Mincho-style option for display headings. Include short readable Japanese samples.
Theme language: shadcn/tweakcn token language with semantic variables: background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart, sidebar, radius.
Color palette: motif-derived near-neutrals and greens only, with named swatches: Petal Ivory, Waxy Cream, Gardenia Shadow, Gloss Leaf, Deep Leaf Ink, Vein Olive, Soft Champagne, Porcelain Surface.
Visual style: polished luxury product system, quiet refined surfaces, glossy leaf accents, ivory cards, soft leaf-green focus rings, restrained premium shadows, crisp component edges, 8px card radius.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Gardenia, no tiny illegible text.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Gardenia dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible board for "Morphous Gardenia" that feels like the provided light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible gardenia motif and the visible light design-system board as references. Preserve the same palette roles, component language, texture rhythm, spacing, typography choices, and polished luxury-product UI mood.
Canvas: strict 16:9 landscape board, target 3840x2160, wide 4K-class source asset, at least 2400px wide if possible.
Resolution and legibility: large readable labels, precise editorial grid, generous section spacing, fewer larger token rows, no dense tiny tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Gardenia, Gardenia Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, modal, popover, command palette/search, top navigation, sidebar navigation, metrics, charts, data table, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, texture samples, spacing scale, 8px radius guidance, border tokens, shadow tokens, semantic tokens, and generated asset examples.
Typography: refined English product UI with luxury editorial display guidance; Japanese typography guidance using Noto Sans JP or Yu Gothic for interface text and a Mincho-style option for display headings. Include short readable Japanese samples.
Theme language: shadcn/tweakcn token language with semantic variables: background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, border, input, ring, chart, sidebar, radius.
Dark palette: deepest glossy leaf ink and garden shadow backgrounds, ivory petal foregrounds, waxy cream cards, muted olive dividers, soft champagne highlights, leaf-green primary actions, restrained rose-warm destructive state only where needed.
Visual style: polished luxury dark product system, quiet dark-green surfaces, subtle gardenia petal texture, glossy leaf accents, soft cream focus rings, crisp component edges, 8px card radius, premium restrained shadows.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon palette, no pure flat black unless used as a tiny ink token, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Gardenia, no tiny illegible text.
